name: Wasmiya
competitive_goal: Compete well at Open and local competitions. Not chasing Games.

ongoing_considerations: Calf strength deficits typically persist 4-6 months post-return
Calf-specific strength work is non-negotiable for at least 3-4 more months
DUs, running, box jumps, BJO, burpees require phased reintroduction
Monitor next-day calf response after every calf-loading session

current_1rms.notes: Bench 1RM 65 kg tested Jan 2026. Push jerk 65 kg tested Mar 25 2026. Most other lifts not formally maxed.

current_benchmarks.notes: Strict pull-up baseline is strong. Calf strength baseline needed at Week 4 test.

priority_gaps.label: Calf-specific strength protocol
priority_gaps.why: Post-injury, permanent fixture for 3-4+ months minimum

priority_gaps.label: Back squat + deadlift cycle
priority_gaps.why: Almost no dedicated strength work for legs in prior logs

priority_gaps.label: Kip pull-up, kip HSPU, kip T2B cycle rate
priority_gaps.why: Strict foundation is strong, now need efficient kipping

priority_gaps.label: Full squat snatch, snatch balance, full clean
priority_gaps.why: Only hang variations in prior logs

priority_gaps.label: Double-unders phased reintroduction
priority_gaps.why: High calf-loading movement, must build back slowly

programming_notes: Calf protocol attaches to Monday, Friday, Saturday sessions
Metcons for Blocks 1-2 must avoid BJO, running, burpees-to-fatigue, and DUs-to-fatigue
Monitor calf response on a 0-3 scale after every session
Test single-leg heel raise reps at end of each 4-week block. Target 25-30 by end of Block 3.
